meaning: n.和服,妇女穿着的宽大晨衣
examples: The sash, kimono, and other garments were made to fit a child.
The kimono had to be picked up at the boutique.
Sometimes later, I found a photo of a rock star dressed in a Kimono.
But the garment whose fate makes Indians clutch their brocade scarfs in terror is the kimono.
Soy-bean, sushi, tofu, kimono, futon, bonsai, karate, jiu-jitsu, honcho and sayonara come from the Japanese.
